components.value: V, S, F (a drop of oil and a small piece of flint)

area.value: one primary target, plus one secondary target/level (each of which must be within 30 ft. of the primary target)

description.value: This spell functions like chain lightning, except as noted above, and the spell deals fire damage instead of electricity damage.
